required_documents.name: topographic_survey
required_documents.label: Levantamiento Topográfico
required_documents.rationale: Required for all projects — establishes site boundaries, levels, and contours. Coastal flat-to-sloping site of 3,000 sqm at 1:500 or 1:200 scale. Client confirms no prior survey has been conducted.

required_documents.name: coastal_zone_permit
required_documents.label: Permiso de Zona Federal Marítimo Terrestre (ZOFEMAT)
required_documents.rationale: Required for coastal Pacific sites in Mexico. Cerritos, BCS is within the federal coastal zone — any construction within or adjacent to the ZOFEMAT boundary requires a permit or non-affectation certificate from SEMARNAT. Client is aware this permit will be required.

required_documents.name: wind_load_study
required_documents.label: Estudio de Cargas de Viento
required_documents.rationale: Required due to strong prevailing coastal Pacific winds noted in site conditions. Wind load study informs structural design, roofing systems, glazing specifications, and coastal-grade material selection. Required before structural engineering can begin in Segment G.
